title: Repairables Anvil
description: Make the anvil repairable with iron ingots
body:
<center>

[![Discord Badge](https://img.shields.io/discord/1051116089133777016?color=green&label=Discord&logo=Discord&logoColor=green&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/jVmUTGFMX5)  

# **Repairables Anvil**  
A simple mod designed to improve the usefulness of anvils by letting players restore chipped or damaged anvils.

</center>

---

## 🔨 How It Works  
- Right-click a **damaged** or **chipped** anvil while holding an **Iron Ingot**.  
- The anvil’s condition will be **restored by one level**.  

---
